query:
SELECT 
  id,
  table_name,
  record_id,
  action,
  old_value,
  new_value,
  changed_at
FROM audit_log
WHERE table_name = 'attendance_events'
  AND DATE(changed_at) >= '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY changed_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
